effects.effect: Discard 1 [Dinuarian] card from your deck, then place this card into your FP Zone, face-down.

effects.name: Dinuarian Elite - R
effects.effect: Your [Dinuarian] Vivosaur's Attack Skills deal +10 base damage for each face-down card in your FP Zone.

effects.name: Reaper's Wrath
effects.effect: Apply Poison to the defending Vivosaur.
